researchBoundary: Design-only remediation after the failed E14.7a feasibility gate. Conditional families are preserved without acquisition, blocked families are retired without fallback, and independently motivated replacements are preregistered for a new metadata-only feasibility audit.

requiredEvidenceTasks: Locate and hash provider-primary H.8 releases covering the 60-month causal history before Continental Illinois 1984.
Prove observation-date, publication-date and revision semantics for deposits, borrowings and bank credit.
Freeze a field-definition and benchmark-revision manifest without downloading research observations.
Freeze distinct BIS narrow and broad EER methodology regimes and applicable episode mapping.
Prove release-calendar and historical-vintage semantics for every applicable episode.
Record attribution and API/export terms in a source contract.
Freeze BIS LBS reporting-population and methodology breaks for each required geography and quarter.
Prove publication-date joins and locate immutable historical release snapshots.
Confirm availability of break- and exchange-rate-adjusted flows for every applicable episode.

retiredFamilies.retirementReason: Only 4 of 60 causal-history months exist before Continental Illinois and the current workbook does not prove the original release vintage.
NASDAQCOM requires third-party permission for the intended immutable research snapshot.
Both Moody's legs remain proprietary and cannot be frozen without permission.
Only 19 of 60 causal-history months exist before Russia/LTCM and complete historical issuance-volume coverage is unproven.
SOFR-era history supplies only 17 of 36 required months before repo-stress 2019.

replacementSources.selectionBasis: Official annual aggregate financial and structural banking statistics provide pre-event structural fragility history unavailable in the retired quarterly family.

replacementSources.provider: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System
replacementSources.selectionBasis: Official market-value aggregates and dated Z.1 release archives provide a public replacement for the licensed equity index.

replacementSources.provider: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System via FRED
replacementSources.selectionBasis: Public-domain short Treasury maturity used to measure rate repricing and curve rotation without proprietary corporate spreads.

replacementSources.provider: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System via FRED
replacementSources.selectionBasis: Public-domain long Treasury maturity paired with DGS2 to capture broad rate dislocation and curve rotation.

replacementSources.provider: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System via FRED
replacementSources.selectionBasis: The public-domain secondary-market CD rate supplies a long unsecured bank-funding leg for Russia/LTCM without changing the 60-month history rule.

replacementSources.provider: Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System via FRED
replacementSources.selectionBasis: The already-ready Treasury-bill leg is retained only as the matched risk-free reference for DCD90.

replacementSources.provider: Federal Reserve Bank of New York
replacementSources.selectionBasis: Official dealer financing and fails data predate the SOFR regime and provide secured-market balance-sheet information for 2019 and 2023.

replacementFamilies.informationRole: Pre-event structural fragility only; never an onset label or contemporaneous event proxy.
Public quarterly breadth proxy, release-available only and never backfilled within the quarter.
Public rate-repricing dimension; it does not claim to reproduce proprietary credit dispersion.
LIBOR-era unsecured bank-funding signal applicable only through the DCD90 discontinuation boundary.
Secured dealer-balance-sheet and market-function signal; data-structure regimes remain separate.
